# Copilot Workspace Instructions

- [x] Verify instructions file exists.
- [x] Clarify project requirements from user prompt.
- [x] Scaffold project in current workspace.
- [x] Customize full-stack implementation for placement dashboard use case.
- [x] Install required dependencies.
- [x] Compile and validate project.
- [x] Create run workflow via package scripts.
- [x] Launch-ready with `npm run dev`.
- [x] Ensure documentation exists and is up to date.

## Project Snapshot

- Framework: Next.js (App Router) + TypeScript
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- Backend: API route at `/api/students`
- Data sources: LeetCode unofficial API + GitHub API (token on server only)
- Caching: in-memory TTL (30 minutes)
- UI: collapsible sidebar, summary cards, searchable/filterable student table, detail drawer, alerts panel
